summary_en: 650,000 shares (1.37% S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-21 at ¥542/share ceiling, total limit ¥352.3M. Open market method. Execution window: single trading session (2026-05-21 08:45 JST).
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury stock and purchase of treasury stock via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading
translation_en_brief: Japan Creative Platform Group Co., Ltd. announced on 2026-05-20 that its board of directors authorized a single-block share repurchase program under Article 156 of the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 650,000 shares (1.37% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury) representing a maximum outlay of ¥352.3 million. Execution method is ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on 2026-05-21 at 08:45 JST, using a price ceiling of ¥542 per share (the previous day's closing price). The purchase order is valid only for that single trading session and will be matched against sell orders in the market. Results will be announced upon trading completion. The stated purpose is to enhance capital efficiency and enable flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions.
